headline: Barclays Maintains Equal-Weight on Fastenal, Raises Price Target to $44
summary: Barclays  analyst Guy Hardwick   maintains Fastenal (NASDAQ:FAST) with a Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $43 to $44.

headline: Baird Maintains Outperform on Fastenal, Raises Price Target to $52
summary: Baird  analyst David Manthey   maintains Fastenal (NASDAQ:FAST) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $51 to $52.
